summary.one_line: The upload succeeded end-to-end and the audio fix was high-value, but the review flow was batched too aggressively and a few UX details were skipped.

followed: normalized audio without modifying the original export
uploaded captions and thumbnail after video upload

deviations.description: Description review and thumbnail selection were batched into one prompt instead of separate focused steps.
Reference frames were available but not shown visually.
The optional processing status check was not offered after upload.

issues.title: Description review and thumbnail selection were batched
issues.description: The user had less focused attention on the description than the skill intended.
issues.operator_takeaway: Some review moments deserve their own prompt even if batching is faster.

issues.title: Loudnorm JSON extraction was fragile
issues.description: The old tail-based pattern almost missed required measurement fields and needed a second parsing pass.
issues.operator_takeaway: Examples in prompts should prefer robust parsing patterns over terse but brittle shell snippets.

issues.title: Thumbnail frames were described but not shown
issues.description: The user chose from text descriptions even though images were available.
issues.operator_takeaway: If the asset is visual, present it visually.

recommendations.action: Split description review and thumbnail selection into separate prompts.
Show thumbnail frame images inline when they are available.
Standardize on a robust loudnorm JSON extraction pattern using grep instead of tail.
Add channel selection support for multi-channel accounts.

feedback_hooks.question: Did batching description and thumbnail review feel efficient or rushed to the operator?
feedback_hooks.how_to_compare: Ask directly after a future run with separate prompts.

feedback_hooks.question: Would showing actual frames change the user's thumbnail choice?
feedback_hooks.how_to_compare: Compare future frame-shown selections against prior text-only choices.
